c74object.name: tap.vocoder~
c74object.description: The tap.vocoder~ object is a basic 24-band channel vocoder. A bank of log-spaced bandpass filters analyses the modulator (left inlet, e.g. a voice); a per-band envelope follower tracks each band's amplitude and shapes the matching band of the carrier (right inlet, e.g. a synthesizer). The result imposes the modulator's spectral envelope onto the carrier.

inlet.digest: Modulator — the spectral-envelope source (e.g. a voice).
Carrier — the signal to be shaped (e.g. a synthesizer).

method.name: clear
method.description: Reset all filter and envelope-follower state.

attribute.name: q
attribute.description: The Q factor (resonance) shared by all of the resonant bandpass filters. Higher values give narrower, more "robotic" bands. Default 20.

attribute.name: response_interval
attribute.description: The envelope-follower analysis period for the excitation stage, in milliseconds. Shorter values track the modulator more sharply; longer values smooth it. Default 20.

attribute.name: gain
attribute.description: Linear makeup gain applied to the summed output. Default 1.
